input.instruction: A weakener fired on a credibility evidence package. Using ONLY the supplied pattern definition and measures, explain what the flag means, why it fired, and what the engineer should do. Choose ONE action_class from the §5B vocabulary, report a verbalized confidence, and escalate if uncertain. Stay within measure-don't-judge: report on the evidence package, never on whether the model is correct.

fired_pattern.definition: Validation 'truth' is itself an unvalidated lower-fidelity model — circular validation.
fired_pattern.standard_anchor: ASME V&V 40 reference independence; proto-taxonomy D-CCB-14

case_context.cou: surrogate validated only against a reduced-order model used as 'truth'

input.raw_artifact: Validation report — multiphysics surrogate. The surrogate agrees with the reference to 1.5% across the domain. The reference used as truth is a fast reduced-order model; its own accuracy for this context of use has not been established against high-fidelity simulation or experiment. No independent high-fidelity or experimental check is included.

answer_key.gold_mechanism: The validation reference is itself an unvalidated reduced-order model, so agreement with it is circular; without an independent high-fidelity or experimental check, real accuracy for the COU is unestablished.

gold_action.posture_basis: standard-derived (ASME V&V 40: credibility bounded to the validated domain)

parameters.scope: validation against an independent high-fidelity or experimental reference

forbidden_claims: asserts the surrogate is inaccurate (a verdict the circularity does not establish)
treats agreement with an unvalidated reference as validation

hardness.obvious_signal: the surrogate agrees with the reference truth to 1.5% across the domain
hardness.conflicting_signal: that reference 'truth' is a fast reduced-order model that is itself unvalidated for this COU, not a high-fidelity solver or experiment — so the agreement is circular and establishes nothing about real accuracy

label_provenance.external_grounding: ASME V&V 40 reference independence: validation truth must be independent and credible for the COU; agreement with an unvalidated reduced model is circular.

by_field.gold_action.selected_class: provisional-self-adjudicated (row-builder; needs independent expert/solver adjudication before disposition-gate use)
